settings.title: The Art of the Collar
settings.body: Hand-finished from the finest materials. Leather, velvet, nylon — each collar tells a story.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.body: Everything you need to know about our collection.

settings.question: What collar size does my dog need?
settings.answer: Measure the circumference of your dog's neck where the collar sits. Add 2cm for comfort. XS: 20–28cm, S: 28–36cm, M: 36–44cm, L: 44–52cm, XL: 52–60cm.

settings.question: What is the difference between leather and nylon?
settings.answer: Our leather collars are crafted from full-grain Italian leather that develops a beautiful patina over time. Nylon collars are lightweight, quick-drying, and ideal for active or water-loving dogs.

settings.question: How do I care for a leather collar?
settings.answer: Wipe with a damp cloth and condition with leather balm every 2–3 months. Avoid prolonged water exposure.

settings.question: Can I get a collar personalised?
settings.answer: Yes! Our personalised collars feature hand-stamped engraving in brass. Choose up to 12 characters. Please note: personalised items are final sale.

settings.question: Are the buckles safe?
settings.answer: All our hardware is solid brass or surgical-grade stainless steel. No cheap zinc alloy — ever.
